question_text: In which of the following scenarios is a remote PIC not required to perform a preflight inspection of their sUAS?
possible_answers: Preflight inspections are required before each flight. Thus us no scenario precludes such an inspection.
If the subsequent flight occurs immediately, following a flight before which an inspection was made.
Preflight inspections are only required for the first flight of the day. So any other flight does not require such an inspection.
